name: Ebisu
description: Ebisu serves primarily as a jonin-level instructor in Konohagakure. He is known for his strict adherence to rules and his belief in traditional ninja values. Initially introduced as a private tutor for Konohamaru, the Hokage's grandson, Ebisu specializes in training elite ninja techniques. Despite his somewhat comical and uptight demeanor, he proves to be a skilled and knowledgeable ninja. Ebisu is later seen supporting other characters in various missions and during significant events throughout the series.
creator: Kujoint
